signature_ref_formats.rule: Local signature or approval reference must resolve in the repository.
External approval reference must identify the source system and record.
Signature reference must identify the signed record.
Approval reference must identify the approval record.
Email reference must identify the approving message or thread.
Ticket reference must identify the approval ticket.
Meeting reference must identify the minutes or decision record.

minimum_owner_rows.title: Owner deferral for all failed G1-G10 gate evidence
minimum_owner_rows.required_owner_basis: Owner accepts deferring all currently failed go-live gate evidence slots.

minimum_owner_rows.title: Owner deferral for all L9 stabilization criteria
minimum_owner_rows.required_owner_basis: Owner accepts deferring all currently blocked L9 stabilization closure criteria.

minimum_owner_rows.title: Owner deferral for all blocked launch work packages
minimum_owner_rows.required_owner_basis: Owner accepts deferring all currently blocked PRE-L9 launch work packages.

minimum_owner_rows.title: Owner deferral for all PRE-L9 phase exits
minimum_owner_rows.required_owner_basis: Owner accepts deferring all currently blocked PRE-L9 phase exits.

intake_batches.title: External dependency intake
intake_batches.required_action: Collect external legal, M365, identity, pilot, or third-party evidence, or obtain a real owner-approved deferral.

intake_batches.title: Owner decision and signature intake
intake_batches.required_action: Record real owner decisions, signatures, acceptance, ratification, or explicit owner-approved deferrals.

intake_batches.title: Policy and scope decision intake
intake_batches.required_action: Resolve policy/scope choices, or obtain owner-approved deferrals with basis and revisit gates.

intake_batches.title: Runtime and operational evidence intake
intake_batches.required_action: Provide real runtime, staging, monitoring, rollback, DR, pilot, or operational evidence, or defer with owner approval.

intake_batches.title: Evidence completion intake
intake_batches.required_action: Fill missing evidence cells, links, records, and acceptance artifacts, or defer with owner approval.

intake_batches.title: G1-G10 gate evidence intake
intake_batches.required_action: Supply failed go-live gate evidence slots, or record coverage-eligible owner-approved deferrals.

intake_batches.title: PRE-L9 phase-exit intake
intake_batches.required_action: Close phase exits through real WP evidence, or record phase-exit owner-approved deferrals.

intake_batches.title: L9 stabilization measurement intake
intake_batches.required_action: Provide measured L9 stabilization/hypercare evidence, or record owner-approved deferrals.
